title: Bothan perception visor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Bothan_Perception_Visor.png|thumb|right|200px|[[Atton Rand]] wearing a Bothan perception visor]]
The '''[[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] perception visor''' was an [[Spy/Legends|espionage]] tool that was used [[4000 BBY/Legends|4,000]] [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] to [[Scout/Legends|scout]] locations without being detected.

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''

*<!-- 2003-07-XX -->[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]
